subject_template: Update on your application - {{role}} at AgentHire
body_template:
Hi {{candidate_name}},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the {{role}} position.

After careful review, we've decided not to move forward with your application at this time. This decision reflects the specific requirements of this role and not your overall abilities.

We encourage you to apply for future openings that match your skills.

Best regards,
The AgentHire Recruiting Team
